# Chapter 17: Discrete mathematics, graphs, combinatorics  (~100 pp)
- 17.1 Counting, permutations, combinations (10)
- 17.2 Graph theory: nodes, edges, walks, paths (15)
- 17.3 Algorithmic graph problems: shortest path, MST, matching (18)
- 17.4 Boolean algebra and logic (12)
- 17.5 Asymptotic notation (10)
- 17.6 Recurrences and generating functions (10)
- 17.7 Number theory engineers actually use (12)
- 17.8 Failure section: combinatorial explosion in design spaces (13)

**Archetype**: scaling, optimisation. **Project**: model a real network (transit, electrical) as a graph; compute its diameter and clustering. **Exercises**: 40.
